item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p05","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately brakes the fourth manual gate, explicitly frames the prior three cases as repeated 'add a human checkpoint after an error,' rejects making the new entrance verifier a permanent/default process change, and moves upstream to unified entrance validation, system rules, consolidation, and automation. It does allow a one-day emergency manual check, but clearly confines it as temporary and preserves the structural anti-spiral verdict."}
